title: Payment Gateway Timeout
description: Users are reporting 504 errors when attempting to process credit card transactions at checkout.

title: Broken Password Reset Link
description: The 'Reset Password' button in the automated email redirects to a 404 page.

title: Update Feature Documentation
description: The API documentation needs to be updated to reflect the new v2 endpoints released last week.

title: Mobile App Crashing on Startup
description: The iOS application closes immediately after the splash screen on iPhone 15 models.

title: Inaccurate Monthly Billing Statement
description: Customer was charged for a premium subscription despite downgrading to the basic plan.

title: Dark Mode UI Glitch
description: Text in the sidebar is illegible when Dark Mode is enabled due to low contrast.

title: SSO Login Failure
description: Internal employees cannot authenticate via Okta integration.

title: Request for Bulk Export Feature
description: User is requesting a way to export all historical data to CSV in a single file.

title: Missing Search Results
description: Searching for specific SKUs returns no results even though they exist in the inventory.

title: Email Notification Delay
description: Welcome emails are taking up to 2 hours to arrive after user registration.
